text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of curiosity tempered by detachment. The sterile, orderly hallway and the precise geometry of the meeting rooms suggest control and structure—qualities both comforting and alienating. As I move into the colorful, interactive R+D space, my curiosity heightens. The displays and digital screens invite engagement, but their cold luminescence and curated narratives remind me of the careful orchestration behind innovation. Here, I sense the paradox of modern institutions: a promise of creativity and progress gently shadowed by the impersonal forces that shape them.
